changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-store/src/error.rs

Several `StoreError` variants have Display messages starting with uppercase: "I/O error", "JSON error", "YAML error", "Store error". The Rust review guidelines specify lowercase, no trailing punctuation for error Display messages.

Suggestion: Change to lowercase: "i/o error: {0}", "json error: {0}", "yaml error: {0}", etc.
StoreError Display messages use uppercase -- should be lowercase per convention
